executives.name: Dion Weisler
executives.background: Dion J. Weisler has been a director since 2020. He was President and CEO of HP Inc. from 2015 to 2019.

executives.name: Ruby Chandy
executives.background: Ms. Chandy was the President of the Industrial Division of Pall Corporation from 2012 to 2015. She previously served as Chief Marketing Officer of Rohm and Haas Company.

executives.name: William Parrett
executives.background: Former CEO of Deloitte Touche Tohmatsu.

tenure_dates.title: Member of the Board of Directors
